description: The EngineDebugDialog component is used in the debug screen of the dash to show debug information about the game at the current moment.

fields._text: The text displaying the engine debug info.

methods.SwitchToGatherJobs: Switches the dialog screen to the Gather Jobs one.
methods.SwitchToWorlds: Switches the dialog screen to the Worlds one.
methods.SwitchToLoadedAssets: Switches the dialog screen to the Loaded Assets one.
methods.SwitchToSpecial: Switches the dialog screen to the Special one.
methods.SwitchToFocusedWorld: Switches the dialog screen to the Focused World one.
methods.SwitchToPhysics: Switches the dialog screen to the Physics one.
methods.SwitchToBackgroundJobs: Switches the dialog screen to the Background Jobs one.
methods.CapturePerformanceStats: Copies the performance stats to the clipboard.
methods.UploadCC0Textures: DEVELOPER TEAM ONLY. DOES NOT DO ANYTHING ON PUBLIC BUILDS!
methods.CopyBackgroundWorkerSnapshot: Copies a background worker snapshot to disk.
methods.ForceFullGC: Forces the engine to garbage collect all ram data.
methods.SaveObjectPoolStats: Saves object pool stats to disk.
